caption: Commenti alla stampa con il Vice Presidente degli Stati Uniti d’America, J.D. Vance.
text: Grazie a tutti. Insomma stiamo lavorando su molte questioni bilaterali ovviamente di rafforzamento della nostra cooperazione ma anche sui tanti dossier internazionali che sono aperti e dicevo col vicepresidente che ci siamo incontrati l'ultima volta a Roma in occasione della inaugurazione del nuovo papato, del papato di Papaleone e oggi ci rincontriamo in occasione della cerimonia inaugurale delle Olimpiadi. Sono due eventi che raccontano un sistema di valori che tengono insieme Europa, gli Stati Uniti, che tengono insieme l'Occidente che è alla base ovviamente della nostra cooperazione, della nostra amicizia e del futuro che vogliamo costruire insieme. Quindi sono molto contento di avere questa occasione. I know you didn't know what I was talking about. I was saying that I... I've actually read Italian since the last time I saw you. I was saying that I'm happy to have you here, to have the occasion to talk about our wonderful bilateral relation, but also about many international topics which are open. And I was reminded that last time I saw you in Rome, it was for the New Pole. And today we meet again for the Olympic Games. It's two events that tell about values that keep together Italy and the U.S., Europe and the U.S., the Western Civilization, and it's mainly the reason why we like to work together. Great ambassador. What's up? Welcome. It's hard to get around. Okay, well, Prime Minister Malone, it's so good to see you and your team, and great to be back in your beautiful country. We love Italy, we love the Italian people, and as you said, we have a lot of great relationships. We have a lot of great economic connections and partnerships, and I think it's... You guys have done an amazing job at the Olympic Games. The city looks beautiful. My wife and I have been excited to attend the Olympics in Milan for pretty much since I became vice president. We've talked about this and wanting to do this, and so very glad that it worked out, and very glad that you guys have done such a good job. So, and the spirit of the Olympics, friendship, competition, competition based on rules, and just coming together around shared values. We're very, very thrilled to be here, and we'll have a great conversation about a number of topics. So, thank you all. Mr. President, thank you, thank you, thank you, thank you, thank you, thank you, thank you, thank you. Thank you.
